meaning: adj.可重新开始的,可重新起动的
examples: One of CVM's design criteria is to be restartable even when you run it on an OS that is not process based.
In addition, GVPE is also easy to setup and configure as a restartable and permanent service, while still retaining security.
The research emphasis is restartable nitrous oxide monopropellant thruster suitable for keeping the position and phase of small satellite.
